<!--
Thanks for contributing! A quick checklist before submitting.
If this is a draft PR, feel free to skip sections and fill them in later.
-->

## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences describing what this PR changes and *why*. -->

## Related issues

<!-- e.g. "Closes #123" or "Part of #456". Remove if not applicable. -->

## Change type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature / capability
- [ ] Refactor (no behavior change)
- [ ] Docs / tooling / CI
- [ ] Other:

## Testing

<!--
Describe how you verified this change. If you added tests, list them.
If the change isn't easily testable (e.g. docs-only), say so explicitly.
-->

- [ ] `cargo test --workspace` passes locally
- [ ] `cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings` is clean
- [ ] `cargo fmt --all --check` is clean

## Notes for reviewers

<!-- Anything that would help a reviewer get oriented — design decisions,
tradeoffs considered, things you'd like extra eyes on. -->
